title: The Humanoids Terrors
description: There are worse than humans on earth
body:
**This mod will bring you a lot of horror characters with humanoid appearances. Each one has a particular particularity that makes them different from each other. You will no longer be safe**

models and some animations by: **_UnknownOFC_**

animations by: **_Me_**

*requires geckolib


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**_Siren Head:_**

- He will rarely appear in the taiga and forests, he is very large and is currently the most dangerous monster in the mod

 
_**Mimic:**_

- It's a mob made of flesh that attacks everything that moves, when it kills another crowd, it disguises itself as a human

 
_**Hypno (Hypno's lullaby):**_

- This devious mob hides in a cave where he locks up children. When he dies, he will let go of his pendulum (more features to come)

 
_**Eyeless Jack:
**_
- He will appear at night in all biomes, he drops a bag of ink (more features to come)

 
_**The dog (duck season):**_

- This mob has a low chance of spawning if you kill a duck. When he died, he dropped his knife

 
_**Mothman:**_

- This flying mob is neutral with the player but will hit all small creatures (cat, chicken...). He appears in the Dark Forest

_**The man in the suit:**_

- this monster is a much larger Gojira costume than the player, you can find him in the abandoned movie studio

</details>



 
Mod discord : https://discord.com/invite/zsD4PM6D8D

UnknownOFC's discord : https://discord.gg/fkcStevr
